# User Story

**As a** customer,
**I need** to be able to filter product search results by price,
**So that** I can quickly find items within my budget.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

**Given** that I am on the product search results page,
**When** I enter a minimum price of 10 and a maximum price of 50 and click filter,
**Then** only products priced between 10 and 50 should be displayed on the page.
